title: "Change screen resolution on EEE PC to 1204x768"
date: 2009-07-22
forum: New to Ubuntu

### Post by MontelEdwards on 2009-07-22
Hello,
I am running Ubuntu 9.04 (Karmic too buggy ) and I want to change my resolution to 1204x768

I tried to edit my XServer configuration file but it didnt help.
This is what it says now 
```
# xorg.conf (X.Org X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using
# values from the debconf database.
#
# Edit this file with caution, and see the xorg.conf manual page.
# (Type "man xorg.conf" at the shell prompt.)
#
# This file is automatically updated on xserver-xorg package upgrades *only*
# if it has not been modified since the last upgrade of the xserver-xorg
# package.
#
# Note that some configuration settings that could be done previously
# in this file, now are automatically configured by the server and settings
# here are ignored.
#
# If you have edited this file but would like it to be automatically updated
# again, run the following command:
#   sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg

Section "Device"
    Identifier    "Configured Video Device"
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
    Identifier    "Configured Monitor"
EndSection

Section "Screen"
        Identifier      "Default Screen"
        Monitor         "Configured Monitor"
        Device          "Configured Video Device"
        DefaultDepth    24
             SubSection      "Display"
                Viewport        0 0
                Depth           24
                Modes           "1204x768"
             EndSubSection
EndSection
```




Thanks in advance,
Montel Edwards

### Post by JOHNNYG713 on 2009-07-22
More info what graphics card ? and be careful playing with your xorg.conf,have you backed it up!? 
sudo cp /etc/X11/xorg.conf /etc/X11/xorg.conf-backup

---

### Post by bodhi.zazen on 2009-07-22
Try adding a higher resolution and / or changing the default depth to 16

### Post by MontelEdwards on 2009-07-22
oh, duh.
Here is from lspci 
```
 00:02.0 VGA compatible controller: Intel Corporation Mobile 915GM/GMS/910GML Express Graphics Controller (rev 04)
00:02.1 Display controller: Intel Corporation Mobile 915GM/GMS/910GML Express Graphics Controller (rev 04)

```
